 ---
title: "diff clusters in Myeloid cell"
author: "Wei"
date: '2025-07-09'
output:
html_document: default
---

# 1. loading library and function
```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tidyverse))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(ggplot2))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(forestplot))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(readxl))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(dplyr))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tibble))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tidyr))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(readr))
options(dplyr.summarise.inform = FALSE)

```

# 2. Loading data
```{r}
lasso_res <- read.csv("/Users/xuewei/ZzzData/20250601_SPLC_MPLC_scRNA/01_preprocessing_v2/35_Metabolism_Lasso_Cox_v4/Rds_02_Lasso_Cox_03_singleGeneCox.txt", sep = "\t", h = T, check.names = F)
# lasso_res <- readxl::read_xlsx('/Users/xuewei/ZeroData/scripts/R_BNR/Cell_death_Rscript/lasso_HR.xlsx')

lasso_res <- lasso_res %>%
  filter(gene != "OS")

```

# 3. plot function input
```{r}
# 1. 直接使用原始 PValue 值（不转换数值）
pvalue_formatted <- ifelse(
  is.na(lasso_res$PValue),  # 处理 NA 值
  "", 
  lasso_res$PValue          # 直接使用原始字符串
)

# 2. 构建 tabletext（确保列名对齐）
tabletext <- cbind(
  c("Gene", lasso_res$gene),
  c("Coefficient", sprintf("%.3f", as.numeric(lasso_res$coef))),
  c("p-value", pvalue_formatted),  # 直接显示 "<0.001" 或 "0.025"
  c("HR", sprintf("%.3f", as.numeric(lasso_res$HR)))
)

# 3. 构建 cochrane_from_rmeta（动态行数）
cochrane_from_rmeta <- structure(
  list(
    mean  = c(NA, lasso_res$HR),
    lower = c(NA, lasso_res$lower),
    upper = c(NA, lasso_res$upper)
  ),
  .Names = c("mean", "lower", "upper"),
  row.names = c(NA, -(nrow(lasso_res) + 1L)),
  class = "data.frame"
)

```

# 4. plot forest
```{r}
fp1 <- forestplot(
  tabletext,
  cochrane_from_rmeta,
  new_page = FALSE,
  is.summary = c(TRUE, rep(FALSE, nrow(lasso_res))),  # 标题加粗
  zero = 1,  # 参考线位置
  colgap = grid::unit(4, "mm"),
  line.margin = grid::unit(4, "mm"),
  lwd.ci = 3,  # 置信区间线宽
  ci.vertices = TRUE,
  ci.vertices.height = 0.2,
  xlab = "Hazard ratio",
  hrzl_lines = list("2" = grid::gpar(lty = 1)),  # 顶部横线
  col = fpColors(
    box = "#f46d43",  # 点估计方框颜色
    lines = "#1c61b6",  # 置信区间线颜色
    summary = "royalblue"
  ),
  txt_gp = fpTxtGp(
    label = gpar(cex = 0.9),
    ticks = gpar(cex = 1.0),  # 修改此处，从0.7增大到1.0
    xlab = gpar(cex = 0.9, fontface = "bold")
  )
)

pdf("20250709_04_AM_forest_v1.pdf", height=6, width=9)
print(fp1)
dev.off()

```
